name: voxintel
description: VoxIntel AI Interview Preparation Platform - root orchestration scripts

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run python"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:python && npm run test:client
